notes: A Palestinian child was shot and killed by Israeli forces during a search operation; two other children were injured in the same incident.

location: Kerem Shalom to Gaza warehouse route
notes: A driver working for a World Central Kitchen logistics partner was killed by Israeli forces while transporting aid goods within an access-restricted area, in a movement reportedly coordinated with Israeli authorities.

location: Gaza Strip (29 June-5 July reporting period)
notes: Per Gaza Ministry of Health, 44 Palestinians were reported killed during the 29 June-5 July reporting period, including those who died of previous wounds.

location: West Bank including East Jerusalem (cumulative since 7 Oct 2023)
notes: Cumulative OCHA-recorded figure: 1,109 Palestinians (at least 243 of them children) killed in the West Bank including East Jerusalem between 7 October 2023 and 29 June 2026; 63 of these deaths occurred in 2026 alone.

Cumulative figure covering the period from the ceasefire announcement on 10 October 2025 through 30 June 2026: 1,053 fatalities and 3,406 injuries recorded from continued Israeli airstrikes, shelling, and gunfire despite the ceasefire.

location: West Bank, near Ramallah (Israeli-staffed road gate)
notes: Transfer of a four-month-old Palestinian infant to hospital was delayed at an Israeli-staffed road gate near Ramallah, where movement restrictions have isolated roughly 12,000 Palestinians; the infant later died at the hospital.
OCHA reported that insufficient funding is threatening the trucked bottled-water supply relied on by roughly 70 percent of Gaza's population.

Aggregate shelter recovery figure: emergency repairs completed on 453 partially damaged homes in the reporting period, bringing the cumulative number of rehabilitated housing units to approximately 1,299 since the start of 2026.
